title: Have Your Aurora and Eat It Too
summary: Traffic in Los Angeles was too much for Jae Shim and his wife Ingrid, a trained chocolatier and pastry chef who worked in high-end hotels in Beverly Hills. A typical hotel pastry kitchen, Jae says, employs about 20 cooks, and they all want to be chocolatiers. Through skill and perseverance, Ingrid r...
